text:

title: Publications
text:
Journal articles


Regularisation for the approximation of functions by mollified discretisation methods with M. Hoffmann SIAM Journal on Uncertainty Quantification (2025)

Solving Abel integral equations by regularisation in Hilbert scales with C. Della Valle Journal of Mathematical Analysis and Applications (2024)

Long-time behaviour of an advection-selection equation with J. Guilberteau, N. Pouradier Duteil Discrete and Continuous Dynamical Systems - B (2024)

A phenotype-structured model for the tumour-immune response with Z. Kaid, J. Clairambault Mathematical Modelling of Natural Phenomena (2023)


Pandemic Lock-down, Isolation, and Exit Policies Based on Machine Learning Predictions with T. Evgeniou, M. Fekom, A. Ovchinnikov, R. Porcher, N. Vayatis Production and Operations Management (2022)


Monostability and bistability of biological switches with J. Guilberteau, N. Pouradier Duteil Journal of Mathematical Biology (2021)


Statistical model and ML-EM algorithm for emission tomography with known movement with O. Verdier Journal of Mathematical Imaging and Vision (2021)


SEAIR framework accounting for a personalised risk prediction score: application to the Covid-19 epidemic with O. Boulant, M. Fekom, T. Evgeniou, A. Ovchinnikov, R. Porcher, N. Vayatis Image Processing On Line (2020)


Asymptotic analysis of selection-mutation models in the presence of multiple fitness peaks with T. Lorenzi Nonlinearity (2020)

Phase portrait control of 1D monostable and bistable reaction-diffusion equations with E. Trélat, E. Zuazua Nonlinearity (2019)


Combination of direct methods and homotopy in numerical optimal control: application to the optimization of chemotherapy in cancer with A. Olivier Journal of Optimization Theory and Applications (2019)

Asymptotic analysis and optimal control of an integro-differential system modelling healthy and cancer cells exposed to chemotherapy with J. Clairambault, A. Lorz, E. Trélat Journal de Mathématiques Pures et Appliquées (2018)

title: Camille Pouchol
text:
I’m an assistant Professor at MAP5, Université Paris Cité.
My research interests revolve around inverse problems, control and optimisation.
Publications · Enseignement · CV · Contact
